src: A plush gray and white husky toy with a red collar, blue eyes, and a black nose. It has a soft, fuzzy texture and a curved tail. The ears point slightly forward.
edit: A lively Aussie puppy with glossy blue eyes, a fluffy merle coat blending gray, black, and white patterns, and a shiny red collar. Its black nose is small and round, with perked ears.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object lies on a large rock in the center of a landscaped urban park. Background includes lush greenery, buildings, a bicycle, and a stop sign on the street.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is on bright green grass, positioned head down as if sniffing. The scene is in an open field of mowed grass, with no distinct features around.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object is near a tree with green grass around, facing downward with a playful stance. The background has a large tree trunk and a grassy field.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object is laying on a green park bench, oriented sideways. The bench is surrounded by a grassy area. The wooden planks have a slightly weathered appearance.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object rests on concrete in front of a red brick wall. The scene is urban with rough-textured bricks and some sidewalk dirt.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object lies on a snow-covered rock in a winter urban park. Background includes snow-dusted greenery, frost-covered buildings, a bicycle, and snow-topped street signs.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is on a field of snow, positioned head down. The open space is a snowy landscape, with a blanket of pure white snow all around.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is near a tree with snow on the ground around, facing downward. The background has a tree trunk draped in snow and a snowy field.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object is sitting on a frosty park bench, sideways. The bench is surrounded by snow-covered ground. The wooden planks appear icy and chill.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object rests on icy concrete in front of a snow-dusted red brick wall. The urban scene is wintery with rough bricks and patches of ice.
